name: Sravanthi Naidu
profileSummary: Sthalam Krishnamurth Sravanthi Naidu is an Indian former cricketer who played as a slow left-arm orthodox bowler. She appeared in one Test match, four One Day Internationals and six Twenty20 Internationals for India between 2005 and 2014. She played domestic cricket for Andhra, Hyderabad and Railways.
